analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with existing black hole-themed UI elements. The test-website appears to be the most developed with CSS animations and JavaScript interactions. The theme should focus on enhancing the cosmic/black hole aesthetic with more animated objects, slides, and page transitions as specified in the event.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with more black hole-themed animations, including swirling effects, glowing elements, and cosmic patterns to create a more immersive experience.
Add more animated slides and interactive elements related to black holes, such as rotating galaxies, pulsing stars, and dynamic content sections.
Implement additional JavaScript animations for black hole effects, such as gravitational pull animations, particle effects, and smooth transitions between slides.
